meaning: n.华丽的服饰,漂亮,装饰,服饰,鲜艳服装,精炼炉
examples: Dora had never received such a gift; she had no finery except her wedding ring.
He was glad that he liked the country undecorated, hard, and stripped of its finery.
In that day the Lord will snatch away their finery: the bangles and headbands and crescent necklaces.
In tailored jackets and riding pants, the French team will look regal in their Hermes finery.
Lest you think the men sporting this finery didn't fight, Guthman will set you straight.
